text: composite_score and multi-eval-day addressed the SELECTION signal (what scalar the GA sorts on).
Argmax-eval (Phase 10) addresses the MEASUREMENT signal (what scalar each eval rollout produces) — orthogonal to selection.

locator.quote: three orthogonal noise reductions on the same scalar

text: composite_score over multi-day-mean over argmax-eval = three orthogonal noise reductions on the same scalar.
